messages.content: Where is my order?
You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email. Let me know if you need further assistance.
Can I cancel my order after placing it?
Yes, you can cancel your order within 24 hours of placing it. Go to 'My Orders' and select 'Cancel'.
How do I return a product?
You can initiate a return within 30 days of delivery by visiting the 'Returns' section in your account.
Why was my payment declined?
Payments can be declined due to insufficient funds, incorrect card details, or bank restrictions. Please check with your bank or try another payment method.
Do you offer international shipping?
Yes, we ship to multiple countries. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by location.
How can I change my delivery address?
You can update your address before the order is shipped. Go to 'My Orders' and edit your shipping details.
Is there a warranty on your products?
Yes, many of our products come with a manufacturer’s warranty. Check the product page for details.
Can I get a refund for my order?
Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days after the return is received and verified.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept credit/debit cards, PayPal, and digital wallets like Apple Pay and Google Pay.
How do I contact customer support?
You can reach our support team via live chat, email, or phone. Visit our 'Contact Us' page for details.
How long does shipping take?
Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days, while express shipping takes 2-3 business days.
Do you offer gift wrapping?
Yes, we offer gift wrapping for select items. You can choose this option at checkout.
I received the wrong item. What should I do?
We’re sorry for the mistake! Please contact our support team with your order details, and we will arrange a replacement or refund.
Can I change my payment method after placing an order?
Unfortunately, we cannot change the payment method once an order is placed. You may cancel the order within 24 hours and place a new one with your preferred payment method.
Do you have a loyalty program?
Yes! Our loyalty program rewards you with points for every purchase, which can be redeemed for discounts on future orders.
How do I apply a discount code?
You can apply a discount code at checkout in the ‘Promo Code’ field before making a payment.
What do I do if my order is delayed?
We apologize for the delay. Please check your tracking link for updates, or contact support if your order is significantly late.
Is my personal information secure on your website?
Yes, we use secure encryption and follow industry standards to protect your personal information.
Do you offer same-day delivery?
Same-day delivery is available in select locations. Please enter your zip code at checkout to see if it's an option for you.
How do I update my email address in my account?
You can update your email address by logging into your account and navigating to the ‘Account Settings’ section.
